title: Research UK Health Beauty Market Trends 2026 Consumer Spending
job: Use the research skill to investigate UK health and beauty market trends for 2026. Focus on consumer spending patterns, emerging product categories like skincare and wellness, and online marketplace growth. Run multiple Brave Search queries, synthesise findings into a research brief, and save it to Obsidian vault at 05-Agent-Outputs/Research/2026-03-17-uk-health-beauty-trends.md using obsidian-sync.
